prompt: Realization proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Call controls risk when range edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because the range still has live equity without enough edge to force a bigger pot.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is stronger when your range still has live equity but not enough edge to start building a bigger pot. The controlled continue keeps realization intact without turning a medium-strength range into forced aggression.
